You may hear claws where there should only be footsteps.
Something feral stirs just beneath your skin.
Your reflection may smile a second too late tonight.
A distant howl may sound disturbingly close.
Tonight’s moon was not meant to be witnessed alone.
You may feel an overwhelming urge to run into the darkness.
Something ancient watches you from the treeline tonight.
The moon seems far too large tonight.
The universe whispers: 'Lock the door before midnight.'
